# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repository keeps its coding-agent guidance in a single, tool-agnostic source of truth:
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). Read it — and the docs it links ([`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md),
[`SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md), [`docs/requirements.md`](../docs/requirements.md)) — before
making changes. Do not duplicate those rules here; update `AGENTS.md` instead.
